testcase.name: test_get_my_topics

skipped.message: BUG: /topics/my route is after /topics/{topic_id} - 'my' is interpreted as topic_id

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_hcs_blockchain.py:341: BUG: /topics/my route is after /topics/{topic_id} - 'my' is interpreted as topic_id

testcase.name: test_account_balance_admin
testcase.failure: tests/test_hcs_blockchain.py:378: in test_account_balance_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_account_balance_non_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 for non-admin, got 520 assert 520 == 403 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_hcs_blockchain.py:393: in test_account_balance_non_admin assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 for non-admin, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 for non-admin, got 520 E assert 520 == 403 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
